SF — March 15, 2026

Nebius.Build / SF

A builder-first event for ML/AI engineers: architecture walkthroughs, inference optimization, and practical robotics workshops for teams shipping in one day.

📍 SHACK15, San Francisco

🕙 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM

👥 150 attendees

🤝 Cerebral Valley + Nebius

View programExplore tracks

Program (SF edition)

One-day workshop+build format with hands-on checkpoints.

9:00 AM

Doors + check-in

Team setup and networking at SHACK15.

10:00 AM

Welcome + Luminary talk

20-minute kickoff with event goals, prizes, and logistics.

10:30 AM

Token Factory workshop

Hands-on practical token/compute workflow using Nebius Cloud.

11:30 AM

Robotics workshop

Physical AI lab walkthrough and live robot setup.

12:30 PM

Robotics workshop (continued)

Pair up with mentors to get coding on the bots.

1:30 PM

Hackathon starts

Start building across all tracks with mentor support.

6:30 PM

Demos

Teams present builds and receive feedback from judges.

7:30 PM

Awards + close

Winners announced and final event recap.

Tracks

Robotics

Run physical AI workflows end-to-end: model integration, command execution, and robot behavior loops under one day of mentorship support.

NVIDIA Cosmos track

Explore Cosmos-aligned multimodal and vision workflows that position teams ahead of the GTC cycle.

Physical AI assets

Hardware and staffing options for day-of implementation.

  • SoloTech: ~45 SO-101 arms currently; ~60 by event time. Best for one-day coding and practical build-up.
  • UFB: 13 Unitree robots; rich hardware capability but higher day-of complexity. Negotiation target: ~$3K–$5K for support.
  • OpenDroids: Two half-human robot units already tested in prior hackathons; solid alternative for hands-on demos.

Recommend 2+ mentors for guided robot access.

Potential partners

NVIDIA

OpenClaw

Physical Intelligence

Skild AI

Hugging Face

Skypilot

LangChain

Inferact/VLLM

Incentives

Grand Prize

~$5K value

Cash + credits + mentor sessions + production support + demo video.

Second Place

~$3K value

Cash + credit package for continued iteration.

Third Place

~$5K value

Cash + in-kind support and community distribution push.

Bonus

GTC tickets

Awarded for standout proof and community impact.

Why Nebius.Build

Nebius is not yet the first infra choice for many builders. This event is built for trust through proof, hands-on deployment, and explicit peer feedback loops.

Every attendee receives clear guidance, practical outputs, and a way to keep building after the event.

Rollout

  • • Pilot in SF with Cerebral Valley
  • • Roll to London / Berlin / Paris / TLV
  • • Scale to NYC, Austin, Seattle, Boston, LA
  • • Each event as repeatable city module with post-event content engine

Swag + venue

  • • Stickers (Token Factory, AI Cloud, Nebius.Build)
  • • Robot-arm-branded decals and optional hoodie/lanyard set
  • • Directional signs + workshop and demo wayfinding
  • • Roll-up table banners in venue high-traffic zones
